title: Foundations of Photography & the Digital Camera
subtitle: PHOT-10 · A 3-week intensive
description: Everything a beginner needs to make deliberate photographs and nothing more: the exposure triangle, focus, reading and using light, the grammar of composition, color and white balance, and a complete RAW-to-export editing workflow, taught through daily lectures, shooting assignments, quizzes, and projects, and mapped control-for-control to the Fujifilm X100VI.

lessons.title: Days 1–7: How a Camera Sees, the Exposure Triangle, Focus
Days 8–14: Reading Light, Composition, Color & Lenses
Days 15–21: RAW, Editing, Genres & Personal Style
